summary: Tested Admin Banners Management (homepage + food banners) and Flash Sale Request System. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tested for: Admin BannersTab, Homepage banners carousel, Food page banners, FoodStoreDashboard Flash tab.

integration_issues.issue: API /api/admin/flash-sale-requests exists but no UI component in FoodOffersTab to view/approve/reject seller flash sale join requests

action_items: Add UI component in admin FoodOffersTab to display/manage flash sale join requests (approve/reject)
The API /api/admin/flash-sale-requests returns requests and stats but there's no frontend to manage them
critical_code_review_comments: Missing admin UI for flash sale requests - API endpoint GET/PUT /api/admin/flash-sale-requests works but no React component to display seller requests for approval

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Banners working, Flash tab working, Admin requests UI missing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for banners and flash sale requests are all working. FoodStoreDashboard /food/dashboard has Flash tab where seller can request to join flash sales. Admin panel has BannersTab working for homepage and food banners. Missing: Admin UI for viewing/approving/rejecting flash sale join requests from sellers.

admin_banners_tab.details: Homepage banners (2) and Food banners (2) visible, CRUD operations working via API

flash_sale_request_system.details: Seller can see available flash sales in /food/dashboard Flash tab, can click 'طلب الانضمام' to join with product selection modal

admin_flash_requests.details: API /api/admin/flash-sale-requests works but NO UI in admin panel to view/approve/reject requests

wallet_integration.details: API shows fee info (5,000 ل.س per product), modal shows fee calculation

homepage_banners_carousel.details: Homepage shows banners in carousel (Green 'منصة توصيل الطعام متاحة الآن!' banner visible)

food_page_banners.details: Food page shows food banners and flash sale countdown banner
